entities.name: ALFISOLS
entities.description: Well-drained soils of the semi-arid tropics characterized by low water-storage capacities and structural instability

entities.name: SEMI-ARID TROPICS
entities.description: The geographic region where Alfisols are found

entities.name: LOW WATER-STORAGE CAPACITIES
entities.description: A physical constraint of Alfisols that limits cropping to the rainy season

entities.name: RAINY SEASON
entities.description: The monsoon period during which Alfisols are cropped

entities.name: TRADITIONAL RAINFED FARMING
entities.description: A farming approach that results in unproductive soils, runoff, and erosion

entities.name: EXCESSIVE RUNOFF
entities.description: A soil degradation issue caused by traditional rainfed farming on Alfisols

entities.name: EROSION
entities.description: A soil degradation issue caused by traditional rainfed farming on Alfisols

entities.name: CONVENTIONAL CROPPING
entities.description: Management practices used to increase crop yields on Alfisols

entities.name: CROP YIELDS
entities.description: The measure of agricultural output increased by improved management of Alfisols

entities.name: TRADITIONAL MANAGEMENT SYSTEMS
entities.description: Existing farming practices used as a baseline for comparing improved management

entities.name: SOIL AND WATER CONSERVATION
entities.description: Practices aimed at improving the physical stability and productivity of Alfisols

entities.name: STRUCTURAL INSTABILITY
entities.description: A physical property of Alfisols that makes conservation practices difficult to formulate

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The overall output of small farms that needs to be sustained

entities.name: ICRISAT
entities.description: The research organization providing evidence on the management of Alfisols
